nasb.text: Now the people came up from the Jordan on the tenth of the first month and camped at Gilgal on the eastern edge of Jericho.

esv.text: The people came up out of the Jordan on the tenth day of the first month, and they encamped at Gilgal on the east border of Jericho.

cnv.text: 正月初十，人民從約旦河上來以後，就在吉甲，在耶利哥的東邊安營。

ccb.text: 那天是一月十日。以色列人从约旦河上来之后，就在耶利哥东边的吉甲扎营。
